title: Settings

install.title: Install app
install.intro: Keep it one tap away on your home screen.
install.installed: The app is already installed on this device.
install.iosIntro: To install it on your iPhone or iPad with Safari:
install.desktopHint: Open your browser menu and choose "Install app".

glucoseRanges.title: Glucose ranges
glucoseRanges.description: Set the limits (mg/dL) to match your target. The critical zone is automatic: anything above "High".
glucoseRanges.saveError: Couldn't save the ranges. Please try again.
glucoseRanges.invalid: Must satisfy: Low < Normal < High, between {{min}} and {{max}} mg/dL.

disclaimerBody: This application is intended for personal health tracking only and does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a healthcare professional.
